segments.speaker: Member
segments.text: Have you tried the food yet?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Not yet, but it smells really good.

segments.speaker: Member
segments.text: Some of it, yes. We rotate who brings what.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: That's wonderful. Food makes a new place feel less intimidating.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: I do, but I'm still figuring out where to buy Korean ingredients here.

segments.speaker: Member
segments.text: There's a good Asian market not too far away.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: I'd love the name if you remember it.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Thank you. That might improve my week immediately.
